<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk005.pdf#page=14 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p226 -->

<!-- header: LANDKREIS BERCHTESGADEN · HÖGLWÖRTH -->

<!-- header: LANDKREIS BERCHTESGADEN · HOGLWORTH -->


[[File:Band11_chunk005_p014_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk005_p014_img002.jpg|thumb|K, Wessobrunner Madonna mit weiblichen Heiligen]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p227 -->
